scene_input.scene_summary: A loud voice shouts out the news of the secret meeting.
scene_input.key_visual_action: Quraysh man shouting with mouth open

schema_output.scene_summary: A loud voice shouts out the news of the secret meeting.
schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 114
schema_output.moral_lesson: Importance of secrecy in spreading the message of Islam

characters.name: Quraysh man
characters.appearance: medium build, muscular posture, wearing a traditional Arabian headdress and a white and brown striped thobe

characters.name: Muhammad
characters.appearance: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades

characters.name: Ansar
characters.appearance: slender build, wearing a simple white thobe and a plain brown woolen cloak

schema_output.narrative_text: A loud voice shouted in the desert, 'The Prophet Muhammad has been invited to a secret meeting with the Ansar!'
schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. A vast expanse of the Arabian Desert landscape stretches out before us, with sandy dunes and rocky outcroppings in shades of beige, golden brown, and dusty blue. Late afternoon sunlight casts a warm glow across the scene, illuminating the faces of three figures in the distance. In the foreground, a Quraysh man stands with his mouth open, shouting out the news in a loud voice, his face red with excitement. Behind him, the man in the green cloak is seen entirely from behind: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades. To his right, a slender Ansar man with a simple white thobe and plain brown woolen cloak, looking on with a mixture of surprise and curiosity. Soft warm golden light, dynamic and energetic mood. Wide shot from a slightly elevated angle. Warm beige, golden, and dusty blue palette with the deep green cloak as a color anchor. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
